title: Create: Golems Galore
description: This project adds your friendly create mod-themed golems to Minecraft! More coming soon!
body:
![Create: Golems Galore!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e7de46b7694980300547e47aa59208d9e386d2b.png)
# Welcome to Create: Golems Galore!
This mod introduces a some create mod themed golems to roam your world. 

## Andesite Golem
The andesite golem is crafted by placing a new item, the Industrial Iron Hat, on top of a block of andesite alloy.

Its main purpose is if it sees a depot with a pressable item. it will act like a press and use its pressing arm to help you out in your create mod world.![Its pressing stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54dc6a846f53a2a7deec5fbbba568e3cd6893bb9_0.webp)

## Brassed Andesite Golem
The andesite golem takes on the power of Brass! (It can press up to a stack of items.)
![Just a brass dude](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff65a950660845faa1ac584e9110bda415854626_0.webp)



## New Blocks!
One of the new blocks added in my mod is the Industrial Iron hat block, you can make this by putting an inustrial iron block in a mechanical press.

![The recipe for the industrial iron hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c150af3c1fc4ac867b4fc500d2c112fa7cc2b937_0.webp)


Another one of the new blocks is the industrial brass block and the industrial brass hat!
![Recipe for the Industrial Brass Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/543750a985bff2d45656c0937052b87786e8648a_0.webp)

![Recipe for the Industrial Brass Hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a214f8bda1cbe5c868ab17fce0415a16a274897_0.webp)
